Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
ACO Pioneer V2 Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 8 

IND_NPI 

LABEL: NPI for Practitioner 

DESCRIPTION: The National Provider Identifier (NPI) for a participating individual (in the case of a record for a 
professional) or organization (in the case of a record for an institution). 

SHORT NAME: IND_NPI 

LONG NAME: IND_NPI 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: CMS Participating Provider Pioneer ACO RIF 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: —
